meta.name: Soul Food Baked Macaroni and Cheese
meta.author: SSA Canonical Catalog

source.notes: Canonical SSA soul food baseline. Custardy baked mac with a creamy cheese sauce and golden top.

meta.summary: Creamy, custardy baked macaroni and cheese with sharp cheddar, creamy cheeses, and a browned top.

notes: Baked dishes with eggs should reach at least 165°F internal temperature.
Cool leftovers quickly and refrigerate within 2 hours.

ingredients.label: Mozzarella, shredded (for stretch, optional but common)
Kosher salt (adjust to taste; cheeses vary)

steps.title: Preheat and prep pan
steps.body: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with butter.

steps.title: Cook pasta (slightly under)
steps.body: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Salt the water. Add macaroni and cook 1–2 minutes less than package directions (al dente). Drain well.

steps.title: Make roux
steps.body: In a saucepan over medium heat, melt butter. Whisk in flour and cook 1–2 minutes, whisking constantly, until the raw flour smell is gone (do not brown heavily).

steps.title: Whisk in milk and thicken
steps.body: Slowly whisk in whole milk, then evaporated milk and cream. Continue whisking until smooth. Simmer gently 3–6 minutes until slightly thickened (it should coat a spoon).

steps.title: Melt cheeses into sauce
steps.body: Reduce heat to low. Add cream cheese and whisk until smooth. Add about 2 cups cheddar + 1.5 cups Colby Jack + 1/2 cup mozzarella (reserve the rest for layering/topping). Stir until melted and silky.

steps.title: Season the sauce
steps.body: Stir in dry mustard, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, black pepper, and salt. Taste and adjust salt/pepper carefully (cheeses can be salty).

steps.title: Temper eggs (prevents scrambling)
steps.body: In a bowl, beat eggs. Slowly whisk 1/2 cup of hot cheese sauce into the eggs to temper, then whisk the egg mixture back into the saucepan off heat.

steps.title: Combine pasta and sauce
steps.body: Add drained macaroni to the baking dish (or a large mixing bowl). Pour cheese sauce over pasta and stir until evenly coated.

steps.title: Layer and top with cheese
steps.body: Sprinkle remaining shredded cheeses over the top (remaining cheddar/Colby Jack/mozzarella). For a more “soul food” layered style, add half the pasta mixture, sprinkle some cheese, then add the rest and top again.

steps.title: Bake until set and golden
steps.body: Bake uncovered 30–40 minutes, until bubbling around edges and the center is set. If browning too fast, tent loosely with foil.

steps.title: Rest before slicing
steps.body: Let stand 10–15 minutes before serving so it sets and slices cleanly.
